summary: POS page redesign tested successfully. All features working: dark theme, table-based layout for products and cart, payment type buttons, footer totals display. UI matches R.Lynx POS style as requested.

minor.issue: Console shows 'Failed to load resource: 404' for some resources - likely missing favicon or static assets, non-critical

issues: ESLint warning: useEffect has missing dependency 'completeSale' - minor code quality issue

passed_tests: POS page loads correctly with dark theme (slate-800/900 background)
Products displayed in table format with columns: الكود (Code), اسم المنتج (Product Name), المخزون (Stock), السعر (Price)
Cart displayed in table format with columns: الكود (Code), المنتج (Product), الكمية (Quantity with +/- buttons), السعر (Price), خصم % (Discount %), المجموع (Total)
Click on product row adds it to cart successfully
Cart badge updates to show number of items
Payment type buttons (نقدي/cash, دين/credit, جزئي/partial) toggle correctly
Footer shows المجموع الفرعي (Subtotal) and الإجمالي (Total) with blue highlight
Complete sale button (تأكيد البيع) present with keyboard shortcut (Ctrl+Enter)
Complete sale button correctly disabled when no session is open
No session warning banner displays correctly: لا توجد حصة مفتوحة
Search input works for filtering products
data-testid attributes present for key elements: pos-page, pos-search-input, customer-select, complete-sale-btn
critical_code_review_comments: POSPage.js Line 393: useEffect hook has missing dependency 'completeSale' - should add // eslint-disable-next-line or include completeSale in dependency array wrapped with useCallback
seed_data_creation: Used existing test product: واقي شاشة تجريبي (barcode: 489742, price: 500.00, stock: 10)
context_for_next_testing_agent: POS page has been completely redesigned with R.Lynx style: dark theme (slate-800/900), table-based layout instead of cards. Products on LEFT, Cart on RIGHT. Footer has payment type buttons (cash/credit/partial), subtotal/discount/total display, and complete sale button. Session must be open to complete sales - warning banner shows when no session. All data-testid attributes are in place for testing.

Products Table.details: Table with Code, Name, Stock, Price columns - clickable rows add to cart

Cart Table.details: Table with Code, Product, Quantity (+/- buttons), Price, Discount%, Total columns

Payment Type Buttons.details: Cash (نقدي), Credit (دين), Partial (جزئي) buttons toggle correctly

Footer Totals.details: Shows Subtotal, Discount input, Debt display, and Total with blue highlight

Complete Sale Button.details: Button present with Ctrl+Enter shortcut, correctly disabled without open session
